attributes.action: Abolish interest on university tuition fees and maintenance loans in England.
attributes.additional_details: Abolishing interest on university tuition fees and maintenance loans is necessary to ensure higher education is fair and accessible. Interest inflates debt far beyond what students borrow, creating long-term financial pressure that discourages participation and limits social mobility. Removing interest would make repayment fairer, reduce inequality, and support economic stability in England.
attributes.background: We call on the Government to abolish interest on university tuition fees and maintenance loans in England. Charging interest disproportionately targets working-class students who rely on loans to access higher education, deepening inequality and entrenching classism in our education system.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition which calls for similar action:
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756832
